macro_context.market_sentiment: Mixed. XRP has a unique dynamic — somewhat decoupled from broader crypto due to regulatory clarity and cross-border payments narrative. Still correlated in broad risk-off moves.
macro_context.btc_dominance: ~57-60% BTC dominance. XRP somewhat insulated from ETH/altcoin weakness due to regulatory clarity achieved.
macro_context.total_market_cap: Total crypto ~$2.8-3.2T. XRP market cap ~$85-90B, consistently top 5-7 by market cap.
macro_context.fear_greed_index: 28-35 = Fear. XRP may show relative strength vs alts due to regulatory tailwinds.
macro_context.fed_outlook: XRP positioned for cross-border payments — less affected by DeFi rate dynamics than ETH/SOL.
macro_context.institutional_flows: XRP ETF applications filed. Ripple IPO plans gaining attention. Bank partnerships expanding. ODL volume growing.
macro_context.regulatory: SEC vs Ripple case largely resolved in Ripple's favor. XRP not classified as security in secondary market. Most favorable regulatory story in crypto after BTC.

ticker_news.headline: XRP ETF applications from Bitwise, WisdomTree, Canary Capital progressing at SEC
Ripple RLUSD stablecoin hits $500M market cap, expanding to new exchanges
Major bank pilot using Ripple ODL for cross-border remittances
XRP tests $1.40-1.45 support amid broader market weakness
XRP Ledger CBDC platform adopted by Pacific island nations
Ripple CEO hints at IPO readiness in 2026

on_chain_signals.whale_activity: Ripple escrow releases monthly (1B XRP, majority relocked). Some selling pressure from escrow releases. Retail flows relatively stable.
on_chain_signals.funding_rates: XRP perpetual funding slightly positive (+0.01-0.02%). Modest long bias. Not overcrowded.
on_chain_signals.exchange_flows: Moderate exchange inflows from Ripple escrow. Net retail flows stable. Very liquid asset globally.

development_activity: XRP Ledger active: AMM live, CBDC platform, EVM sidechain for smart contracts, Hooks amendment for programmability, RLUSD stablecoin. Native DeFi growing rapidly.
upcoming_catalysts: XRP spot ETF approval. Ripple IPO. RLUSD adoption expansion. ODL volume with bank clients. XRP Ledger EVM sidechain developer activity. CBDC deployment milestones.
